mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fixed_price WHERE market_id = #{market_id} AND YEAR(price_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(price_time) = MONTH(NOW()) AND DAY(price_time) = DAY(NOW()) GROUP BY price_time

SELECT FLOOR(SUM(B.gen_val / 1000) * A.price) as sold FROM ( SELECT price_time, price FROM tb_fixed_price WHERE market_id = 'KPX_SMP' AND YEAR(price_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(price_time) = MONTH(NOW()) AND DAY(price_time) = DAY(NOW()) ) AS A, tb_pv_gen AS B WHERE B.site_id = #{site_id} AND B.std_date = A.price_time
